How we will work with you

Painting production process

Send a photo and your wishes

We prepare design options taking into account your requirements

You approve the layout and the artist starts work

Choose a baguette frame option and design

Address and convenient delivery time are agreed

You pay the remaining amount to the courier upon receipt of the painting

Framing in baguette frames

We can offer you framing in any frame from a huge assortment at your request.

Order an oil portrait from a portrait painter

Exclusively, qualitatively, detailed manual drawing.

Didn't find what you were looking for?

Download our catalog with 50 style options for free!

'

"...I got exactly what I dreamed of, and even with home delivery!..."

I live in a small village and ordering a portrait was a real feat for me! I sent our photos with my wife and asked to make several layouts to choose from. To my surprise, very soon they sent me not just a few, but as many as 15 different layouts! I chose the best one and placed the order.

Oleg Petrov, v. Mesyagutovo

"...I'm delighted! I didn't think a portrait could be so beautiful!..."

My friend's husband gave a portrait as a gift, and I also wanted to order one. Out of all the layouts, this one immediately caught my eye! And it fits perfectly into my living room interior. Now it hangs here in a place of honor, and I admire it every time. All my relatives also really liked it!

Irina Antonova, Kislovodsk

"...Unexpected birthday gift from friends..."

I want to share my impressions of the gift I received yesterday. Cool work, done with natural paints! As a pedantic person, I love details, they are very important to me, and here they are done coolly - they drew a watch, my favorite sweater, a T-shirt with an elastic band. Very positive caricature, made from my photo.

Narek Margaryan, Velikiye Luki

Frequently asked questions

We will answer any of your questions

How long does it take to complete the order?

The order execution time depends on three factors: the complexity of the painting, the writing style and size. The average order execution time is 7 days excluding delivery time. In some cases, at the customer's request, the deadline can be reduced to 5 days.

Note: If you decide to change something in the painting, make corrections - this may take additional time, which is not taken into account in the agreed execution period.

Will I be able to see the painting before receiving it?

Yes. Upon completion, we send a digital photo of your painting by email so that you can, if necessary, make your corrections and wishes if any. You can also see the painting "live" in our salon. Tell your manager about this.

What format should the photos be in

We work with all known image formats! Through the site you can upload JPEG, TIFF, PNG up to 50 megabytes. You must have copyright or permission to use the image. If you have a different image format (RAW, PDF), you can use the FTP uploader. If you want to make a photo from a paper photo (not digital), send it to us, we will scan, process and return the photo along with your order!

Can I give special instructions to the artist

When you place your order on the site, you can add your comments in a special text field. You can also: combine objects from different photos into one or remove objects from photos, you can change the background, change clothes, outfits, make a color painting from a black and white photo, and also order a painting from a damaged or old photo.

Just send a photo and

We will send you the design for free within 1 hour!
